For each evaluation block, vessel and background masks are derived once from an external super-resolved vascular reference derived by registering the published PALA rat-brain ULM example back onto the Zenodo IQ grid and downsampling the registered MatOut rendering to the short-window evaluation lattice; short 64-frame windows from the held-out block are then scored without additional frame-to-frame registration on the same MC--SVD residual cube using different downstream detector heads.
